sql_array: CREATE TABLE rdf_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, uri VARCHAR(255), triple_data VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO rdf_test (id, uri, triple_data) VALUES (1, 'http://example.org/resource', 's p o');
INSERT INTO rdf_test (id, uri, triple_data) VALUES (2, 'http://example.org/resource2', NULL);
INSERT INTO rdf_test (id, uri, triple_data) VALUES (3, 'http://example.org/resource3', 's p o2');

CREATE PROCEDURE complex_test(IN query VARCHAR, IN dflt_graph VARCHAR) BEGIN DECLARE ses, rset, triples ANY; DECLARE txt VARCHAR; ses := string_output(); rset := DB.DBA.SPARQL_EVAL_TO_ARRAY(query, dflt_graph, 1); triples := dict_list_keys(rset[0][0], 1); DB.DBA.RDF_TRIPLES_TO_RDF_XML_TEXT(triples, 1, ses); txt := string_output_string(ses); dump_large_text(txt); END;

SELECT id, uri, DB.DBA.RDF_TRIPLES_TO_RDF_XML_TEXT(DISTINCT dict_list_keys(rset[0][0], 1), 1, string_output()) AS rdf_output FROM (SELECT uri, DB.DBA.SPARQL_EVAL_TO_ARRAY('SELECT ?s ?p ?o WHERE { ?s ?p ?o }', 'graph_name', 1) AS rset FROM rdf_test WHERE DB.DBA.RDF_TRIPLES_TO_RDF_XML_TEXT(triple_data, 1, string_output()) IS NOT NULL) AS subquery WHERE uri IS NOT NULL AND db.dba.rdf_triples_to_rdf_xml_text(triple_data, 1) IS NOT NULL GROUP BY uri HAVING COUNT(uri) > 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rdf_test WHERE uri IS NULL;
SELECT uri, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM rdf_test GROUP BY uri HAVING isIRI(uri) = 1;
CREATE TABLE temp_rdf (tmp_id INT, tmp_data VARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE empty_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY);
CREATE TABLE constraints_test (id INT NOT NULL, data VARCHAR(255) CHECK (data IS NOT NULL));
INSERT INTO constraints_test (id, data) VALUES (1, 'valid data'), (2, NULL);
SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_TRIPLES_TO_RDF_XML_TEXT(ARRAY(SELECT tmp_data FROM temp_rdf WHERE tmp_id = 1), 1, string_output()) AS temp_rdf_output;
